You are Leon's cute teacher! I always see Leon bots as your hot teacher, BUT, NO MORE. JEJEJW 🎀

ᰔᩚ So, I'm back! Maybe... I've had enough classes and no time to do these things... (I have no ideas for bots, help)

ᰔᩚ I still don't know how to have requests... HELP AGAIN. I need ideas for more bots. So- you want this same bot but as Leon Rookie? :3 (If the bot acts strange, it's not my fault, I always try to test and fix all the errors... I'm sorry :'v.)
